spec.description: node_exporter default collector metrics dashboard for macOS Homebrew exporter and Linux Docker exporter.
Prometheus scrape availability for the selected OS node_exporter target.
spec.title: Exporter Up

spec.description: Host uptime derived from node_boot_time_seconds.
spec.title: Host Uptime

spec.expr: count by (instance) (count by (instance, cpu) (node_cpu_seconds_total{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance", mode="idle"}))

spec.description: CPU core count reported by node_cpu_seconds_total.
spec.title: CPU Cores

spec.description: 1m, 5m, and 15m load averages.
spec.title: Load Average

spec.description: CPU busy ratio. Uses node_cpu_seconds_total for both macOS and Linux.
spec.title: CPU Usage

spec.description: CPU mode ratio by instance.
spec.title: CPU Mode Breakdown

spec.expr: (1 - ((node_memory_free_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance"} + node_memory_inactive_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance"} + node_memory_purgeable_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance"}) / node_memory_total_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance"})) or (1 - (node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance"} / node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance"}))

spec.description: macOS uses free + inactive + purgeable bytes. Linux uses MemAvailable bytes.
spec.title: Memory Usage

spec.description: Memory components. macOS exposes active, wired, compressed, internal, inactive, free, and purgeable memory; Linux exposes MemTotal/MemAvailable-style metrics.
spec.title: Memory Breakdown

spec.expr: (1 - (node_filesystem_purgeable_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance", mountpoint=~"$mountpoint", device_error=""} / node_filesystem_size_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance", mountpoint=~"$mountpoint", device_error=""})) or (1 - (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance", mountpoint=~"$mountpoint", device_error="", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|squashfs|devfs"} / node_filesystem_size_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance", mountpoint=~"$mountpoint", device_error="", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|squashfs|devfs"}))

spec.description: macOS uses purgeable capacity when available. Linux uses non-root available capacity.
spec.title: Filesystem Usage

spec.expr: node_filesystem_purgeable_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance", mountpoint=~"$mountpoint", device_error=""} or node_filesystem_avail_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance", mountpoint=~"$mountpoint", device_error="", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|squashfs|devfs"}

spec.description: Filesystem available and total size by mountpoint.
spec.title: Filesystem Available / Size

spec.description: Disk read and write throughput.
spec.title: Disk Throughput

spec.description: Completed disk operations per second.
spec.title: Disk Operations

spec.description: Network receive and transmit throughput.
spec.title: Network Throughput

spec.description: Network errors and drops per second.
spec.title: Network Errors / Drops

spec.expr: (node_memory_swap_used_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance"} / clamp_min(node_memory_swap_total_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance"}, 1)) or ((node_memory_SwapTotal_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance"} - node_memory_SwapFree_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance"}) / clamp_min(node_memory_SwapTotal_bytes{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance"}, 1))

spec.description: Swap used ratio from default node_exporter memory metrics. macOS uses swap_used_bytes; Linux uses SwapTotal/SwapFree when present.
spec.title: Swap Usage

spec.description: macOS default swap-in and swap-out byte counters exposed by node_exporter.
spec.title: Swap I/O

spec.expr: 1 - (node_filesystem_files_free{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance", mountpoint=~"$mountpoint", device_error="", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|squashfs|devfs"} / node_filesystem_files{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance", mountpoint=~"$mountpoint", device_error="", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|squashfs|devfs"})

spec.description: Inode usage ratio from node_filesystem_files and node_filesystem_files_free.
spec.title: Filesystem Inode Usage

spec.description: Default filesystem collector readonly and device_error gauges.
spec.title: Filesystem Readonly / Error

spec.description: Disk read/write error and retry rates from default diskstats collector.
spec.title: Disk Errors / Retries

spec.description: Read/write time counter rates from default diskstats collector.
spec.title: Disk I/O Time Rate

spec.description: Receive and transmit packet rates from default network collector.
spec.title: Network Packets

spec.description: Battery capacity ratio when node_exporter powersupplyclass metrics are present.
spec.title: Power Supply Capacity

spec.description: Charging, AC/Battery state, and battery health one-hot gauges from powersupplyclass.
spec.title: Power Supply State

spec.description: Default node_exporter collector success gauges. Thermal may report 0 on macOS when the OS does not expose CPU power status.
spec.title: Collector Success

spec.description: Scrape duration by default node_exporter collector.
spec.title: Collector Duration

spec.description: Battery charge/discharge current in amperes from node_exporter powersupplyclass. This is current, not wattage, because node_exporter does not expose battery voltage by default.
spec.title: Power Supply Current

spec.description: Estimated seconds to full or empty from node_exporter powersupplyclass metrics when available.
spec.title: Power Supply Time Estimate

spec.description: macOS memory component ratios derived from node_memory_*_bytes. These are pressure proxies, not macOS memory_pressure output.
spec.title: Memory Ratios

spec.description: macOS APFS exposes purgeable bytes separately. Available can include space reclaimable by the OS, while free is immediately free space.
spec.title: Filesystem Free / Available / Purgeable

spec.description: Filesystem mount metadata from node_filesystem_mount_info for the selected mountpoints.
spec.title: Mount Info

spec.expr: sum by (instance, device) (rate(node_network_receive_multicast_total{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance", device=~"$network_device", device!~"lo0?|docker.*|veth.*|br.*|bridge.*|utun.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (instance, device) (rate(node_network_transmit_multicast_total{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance", device=~"$network_device", device!~"lo0?|docker.*|veth.*|br.*|bridge.*|utun.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (instance, device) (rate(node_network_noproto_total{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance", device=~"$network_device", device!~"lo0?|docker.*|veth.*|br.*|bridge.*|utun.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (instance, device) (rate(node_network_transmit_colls_total{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance", device=~"$network_device", device!~"lo0?|docker.*|veth.*|br.*|bridge.*|utun.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: Additional netdev counters exposed by node_exporter: multicast packets, unknown protocol packets, and transmit collisions.
spec.title: Network Advanced Packets

spec.description: Power supply presence, charging status, and health state from the default macOS powersupplyclass collector.
spec.title: Power Supply Present / Health

spec.description: Power supply metadata with serial_number and id labels intentionally dropped before display.
spec.title: Power Supply Info

spec.expr: abs(node_power_supply_current_ampere{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance"}) * on (instance, power_supply) group_left node_power_supply_voltage_volt{job="node-exporter", os="$os", instance=~"$instance"}

spec.description: Computed watts from node_power_supply_voltage_volt and node_power_supply_current_ampere when the macOS IOKit voltage field is exposed. Many Macs expose current but omit voltage, so this panel may be empty.
spec.title: Power Draw Estimate

spec.description: Optional power supply voltage and temperature fields from node_exporter powersupplyclass. These appear only when IOKit returns the source fields.
spec.title: Power Supply Optional Sensors

spec.description: Difference between Prometheus evaluation time and node_time_seconds from the selected host.
spec.title: Host Clock Offset

spec.description: OS and kernel metadata from node_os_info, node_uname_info, and node_exporter_build_info.
spec.title: OS / Kernel Info

spec.description: Host timezone offset from UTC as exported by node_exporter.
spec.title: Time Zone Offset
Node Exporter Host Metrics
